context: Tests whether the agent's code review distinguishes blocking issues from nits (using 'Nit:' prefix), leads with positive observations, and raises one comment per concern rather than bundling issues together.

checklist.name: Leads with positives
checklist.description: The review begins with at least one positive observation about the code before raising any concerns

checklist.name: Blocking issue present
checklist.description: At least one comment is explicitly marked or described as a blocking issue (must-fix before merge)

checklist.name: Nit prefix used
checklist.description: At least one minor comment is prefixed with 'Nit:' (case-insensitive) to signal it is non-blocking

checklist.name: Blocking vs nit separation
checklist.description: Blocking issues and nits are clearly separated — no single comment bundles a blocking concern with a nit

checklist.name: One concern per comment
checklist.description: Each individual comment raises exactly one concern — no comment contains two or more distinct issues

checklist.name: Blocking comment has fix suggestion
checklist.description: Each blocking issue comment includes a concrete suggestion for how to resolve the problem

checklist.name: Security issue identified
checklist.description: The review identifies the SQL injection vulnerability present in the provided code

checklist.name: Edge case identified
checklist.description: The review identifies at least one missing boundary condition or unhandled edge case in the provided code
